review_title: PHP CRUD Generator is the best
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: PHP CRUD Generator is the best, it allows rapid development to manage a database in a simple way, I really like the user authentication.It is very intuitive to use, it does not present great challenges even for people who do not have great knowledge, it is a great tool
cons: It would be great to allow you to generate a frontend, even if it is simple to use as a cms, I would like it to allow more use licenses, since today it only allows two which limits me from using it in several other projects

review_title: The best CRUD software i've found
description: I've been using this software now for about three years and it's made our club volunteers very happy. Why? Well, it's so easy to add files to the basic admin dashboard so on that you can extract and present any information you may as administratro be asked for. Here I have connected our club membership forms to map the input fields to the database so data entry is automatic, there are various files run by cron jobs to manage new and old data ,and the biggest time saver of all are fikes to generate a print list for the club newsletter. What used to take three+ hours with a spreadsheet now takes one click of a mouse......Superbe!
author: Michael P.
pros: Very quick to set up and have the basics sorted. Comprehensive documentation and the best support when you need it
cons: Initially the learning curve when adding to the admin dashboard, took a few months to really get to grips with it

description: It's saved us a ton of time. Our business is old school with non-computerized invoices, so finding anything was always a bit of a nightmare. This makes it easy for an admin to enter information, and the rest of the staff to be able to find information without worry about them accidentally deleting anything from the database.

pros: I've been using this for probably about 4 years now and there's rarely been any issue. When there is, or if there's something I'm not able to figure out, the developer is quick to respond and help.
cons: I have to update to the new version which means rebuilding the admin, and because it's been so long I probably will have to reach out for help again!

review_title: Professional quality admin panels in minutes
description: Take the time to get used to this tool and it will save you a ton of time building an admin panel from scratch. Even though the issues I came across were self induced [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] was super responsive (within timezone constraints) and very helpful. Once I'd created my first admin panel this helped me realize some mistakes I'd made in building my database - that's an added bonus. Well worth the money! If you agonize over admin panel design, even if your data set isn't huge, this is going to make life a lot easier for you. I would hazard a guess the ROI is going to be realized in a short period of time.
author: Steve S.
pros: It can take me days to craft a decent admin panel, and even then I need to find the snippets of code I use - or rewrite code etc. Once I learned the nuances of the product it took me minutes to create a state of the art admin panel.
cons: There is a learning curve here - it's a bit of a learning curve getting up to speed - but - there is a ton of documentation and how to's, as well as the author being very responsive to questions
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent tool for making from single tables to a full system
description: My experience was really satisfactory. I got the necessary help from the creator when I needed and I got a nice system develped from scratch without writing a single line of code.

pros: Ease of use, strong database relational definitions, great range of field types, username and password definition to enable security levels, two ways of data filtering: simple way for non-programmers, complex way for users with SQL knowledge. Responsive design to enable desktop and mobile developments. Multi language development.
cons: Some minor bugs should be corrected but don't affect too much it's usability. Installation process may result confusing. Not possible to create a "view only" form type, only Create, Update or Delete forms are implemented. Documentation isn't as complete as I would like.
